strengths: Demonstrates good knot tying technique with proper hand positioning
Shows consistent extracorporeal knot formation mechanics
weaknesses: Failed to complete the actual FLS Task 5 requirements

drills.name: Mark-to-mark needle path drill
drills.description: Practice 10 passes through both targets on the Penrose drain before any knot tying to establish proper task sequence.
drills.targets_weakness: No suture placement through the marked targets on Penrose drain

drills.name: Complete task sequence rehearsal
drills.description: Perform the full FLS Task 5 sequence: needle through both marks, then secure with extracorporeal knots, focusing on task completion rather than speed.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the actual FLS Task 5 requirements

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on completing the full task requirements before refining technique. Your knot tying skills are solid, but you need to integrate them into the complete FLS Task 5 sequence with proper suture placement through the marked targets.
